start.question: What type of incident are you reporting?

incidentDate.question: On which date did the incident occur?

incidentTime.question: At what time did the incident occur?

incidentLocation.question: Where did the incident take place? (Provide full address or description)

incidentDescription.question: Please describe the incident in detail (what happened, how it happened).

propertyInvolved.question: Was any property, item, or money involved in the incident?

propertyDetails.question: Please provide details of the property/item (name, value, quantity, description).

accusedKnown.question: Do you know the accused person?

accusedDetails.question: Provide details of the accused (name, address, contact, relationship if any).

suspectDescription.question: Provide any description of the suspect (appearance, clothing, behavior).

witnessAvailable.question: Were there any witnesses to the incident?

witnessDetails.question: Provide details of witnesses (name, contact, what they saw).

evidenceAvailable.question: Do you have any evidence (photos, videos, documents)?

victimDetails.question: Provide your full name, address, and contact number.

additionalInfo.question: Is there any additional information you would like to provide?
